name: Ichiran Ramen Shinjuku
description: Famed chain serving classic Hakata-style pork-broth ramen in individual dining booths.

name: Sukiyabashi Jiro
description: The world-famous 3-star Michelin sushi establishment helmed by master chef Jiro Ono.

name: Tsunahachi Tempura
description: Serving crispy, traditional sesame-oil tempura since 1924 in central Shinjuku.

name: T's Tantan Tokyo Station
description: Incredibly popular plant-based ramen restaurant located inside the gates of Tokyo Station.

name: L'As du Fallafel
description: Renowned counter-serve spot in the Jewish Quarter, legendary for packed falafel sandwiches.

name: Le Jules Verne
description: A 1-star Michelin gastronomic restaurant located on the second floor of the Eiffel Tower.

name: Bouillon Chartier
description: A historic, bustling grand bouillon serving traditional, cheap French fare in a beautiful Art Nouveau hall.

name: Cafe de Flore
description: One of the oldest and most prestigious coffeehouses in Paris, famous for its historic intellectual clientele.

name: Pizzeria Da Remo
description: An authentic, loud, and classic Roman pizzeria in Testaccio, serving wood-fired thin-crust pizza.

name: La Pergola
description: Rome's only 3-star Michelin restaurant, offering panoramic city views and legendary gourmet creations.

name: Trattoria da Enzo al 29
description: Tiny, cozy trattoria in Trastevere serving legendary traditional Roman pasta dishes.

name: Flower Burger Rome
description: Fun, modern plant-based burger joint famous for its colorful buns made from natural extracts.

name: Dishoom Covent Garden
description: Stunning café serving Bombay comfort food, famous for long queues and incredible breakfast naan rolls.

name: The Ledbury
description: A 2-star Michelin restaurant in Notting Hill, championing British wild produce.

name: Poppies Fish & Chips Spitalfields
description: Award-winning fish and chips shop with retro 1950s decor and freshly caught local fish.

name: Joe's Pizza Greenwich Village
description: A greenwich village institution serving classic, thin-crust, street-style NYC slices.

name: The Modern
description: A 2-star Michelin venue inside the Museum of Modern Art, overlooking the sculpture garden.

name: Katz's Delicatessen
description: Iconic, bustling Jewish deli in the Lower East Side, curing meats since 1888.

name: Dirt Candy
description: An award-winning Michelin-starred vegetarian restaurant on the Lower East Side.

name: Naughty Nuri's Ubud
description: Famous roadside warung style diner known for the best sticky ribs and energetic shaker dances.

name: Warung Makan Teges
description: Authentic local spot serving traditional mixed rice with Balinese spiced chicken and pork.

name: Locavore Ubud
description: Hyper-local fine dining focusing on sustainable, ingredient-driven modern Indonesian gastronomy.

name: Quay
description: An iconic harbor-front restaurant offering modern Australian tasting menus overlooking the Opera House.

name: Mary's Newtown
description: A gritty, loud, heavy metal bar in Newtown serving some of the best, most satisfying burgers in town.

name: The Fish Market Cafe
description: Serving fresh seafood in the bustling Sydney Fish Markets, right on the water.
